Back to All Services

Lender Provided Documents

We provide professional mobile notary and loan signing agent services for lender-provided document packages. We ensure all signatures, dates, and initials are properly executed for a smooth closing process.

Refinance Packages

Comprehensive sets of documents required to close a mortgage refinance.

Buyer/Seller Packages

Complete sets of documents needed for the purchase or sale of real estate.

Loan Modifications

Agreements altering the terms of an existing loan, often to prevent foreclosure.

HELOCs

Documents for establishing a Home Equity Line of Credit.

Reverse Mortgages

Specialized loan packages for seniors converting home equity into cash.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are you certified to handle loan signings?

Yes, our team holds the National Notary Association (NNA) Certified Notary Signing Agent credential. We are thoroughly background-screened and maintain E&O insurance.

Will you print the loan package?

Absolutely. We are equipped with dual-tray laser printers to print your loan documents correctly in legal and letter sizes.

Can you provide scanbacks for the lender/title company?

Yes, we provide high-quality scanbacks of the signed documents directly to the title company or lender immediately after the signing.

Do you drop documents off at FedEx or UPS?

Yes. Upon completing the signing and quality check, we promptly deliver the documents to the requested carrier (FedEx/UPS) to ensure they make the cutoff time.

What if the borrower has questions about their loan terms?

As Notary Signing Agents, we cannot explain or advise on loan terms. However, we will point the borrower to the closing disclosure and offer to contact the loan officer or escrow agent directly during the appointment.

Book Assignment

Professional mobile notary and loan signing services brought directly to your doorstep.

Need a Notary Now?

Call or text 980-505-8050 to schedule your appointment. Same-day and after-hours appointments available.
